VIP-Club
FAQ
What deposit methods are available?
Kasowin offers a wide range of convenient and fully secure deposit methods to suit every player’s needs. You can fund your account quickly and safely with zero fees using various cryptocurrencies such as BTC, ETH, BNB, USDT, USDC, TRX, SOL, TON, and more. Additionally, our platform supports traditional fiat payment options, including credit/debit cards, bank transfers, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and others through our verified payment partners. All payment methods ensure instant deposits with minimal or zero fees, providing a smooth and secure transaction experience.
For detailed information about the available deposit methods in your location, please visit the "Profile" page and select the "Deposit" tab, or contact our Live Chat for fast and professional assistance.
How many times can I claim a bonus?
The number of times you can claim a bonus depends on the specific promotion. For example, the Welcome Bonus with a promo code is available only once and exclusively for new verified accounts. Meanwhile, the Daily Rakeback promotion allows players to receive a refund on a portion of their bets in Original Games or Slots every 24 hours.
Please review the terms and conditions of all available promotions and bonuses on the "Promotions" page, or contact our Live Chat for quick and professional assistance 24/7.
How do I verify my Kasowin account?
To verify your account, go to your Profile and select the "Verification" tab. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete all required steps, this process usually takes no more than 45 seconds. Account verification is a one-time procedure required by Curaçao Gaming regulations and is essential for your security. It helps us prevent fraud, ensures a safe environment for all players, and allows for faster withdrawals as well as enhanced account protection.
Is Kasowin safe?
Absolutely. Kasowin is a fully licensed, decentralized, and legitimate crypto casino operating under the oversight of the Curaçao Gaming Control Board. We prioritize the safety and security of our players above all else. Our platform leverages advanced blockchain technology and smart contracts to ensure transparent, fair, and unbiased gameplay without intermediaries. All user data and funds are protected by robust encryption and strict security protocols. Additionally, we regularly undergo independent security audits to maintain the highest standards of trust and reliability. For full details on our licenses and security measures, please visit our "Licenses Security" and "About Us" pages.
How do I withdraw funds from Kasowin?
Withdrawing your funds from Kasowin is simple and secure. Go to the "Profile" page and select the "Withdraw" tab. Then choose your preferred withdrawal method—either cryptocurrency or bank card—and enter the required details and the amount you wish to withdraw, following the on-screen instructions. Once you complete all steps, the funds will be sent to your wallet instantly.
How can I reach customer support?
The quickest and most convenient way to contact Kasowin's support team is via Live Chat. This service is accessible from any device and allows you to instantly communicate with professional customer support 24/7. Our team is always ready to assist you with any questions related to Kasowin, gameplay, account safety, payments, and more.
